title: Agent adapter layer
objective: Introduce an adapter interface so shell, codex, claude, and openhands are pluggable without changing task packet semantics.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Define adapter interface: prepare, execute, collectArtifacts, summarize.
Shell adapter implements the interface and remains the default.
Codex/Claude/OpenHands are present as disabled placeholder configs only.
Target Repo .harness/agents/adapters.yml reflects the adapter layer.

koObjective: Shell, Codex, Claude 등 agent 실행 방식을 어댑터로 분리한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
